verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting the convergence of the 'Sadolin' brand (Linguistic/Meta) with the physical geography (Landscape/Botanics) and traffic rules (Regulatory). The judge explicitly evaluated the lack of contradictory evidence (e.g., license plates) and correctly identified Uganda as the only country fitting the specific brand prevalence and environmental profile.
